title: andruris nana
intro: Andruris nana, also known as Dendranthema nana or Chrysanthemum nanum, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Andruris nana include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate headaches, and provide relief from menstrual cramps. Andruris nana can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential benefits and uses.
